nebius.label: Ran the same extraction task on Nebius Token Factory

daytona.label: Custody re-verified in an isolated Daytona sandbox

neo4j.label: Loaded into a live Neo4j AuraDB instance

rocketride.label: Ran a real Cloud pipeline (webhook -> llm_nebius -> answers) that returned the extracted claims

pipeline.note: The webhook source node is a persistent HTTP listener, so status.completed stayed false; the terminal PIPELINE_RESULT carried the answers (the extracted claims).
